subtitle: A warm birthday surprise created by Norma
bigline: Five spins made especially for Faye
marqueeStart: Faye, your birthday celebration is ready

welcome.title: Welcome, Faye
paragraphs: Norma created this personalized Birthday Slots greeting especially for you.
You have five official spins, and every official spin is a win.
Press the button when you are ready to begin your celebration.
welcome.overrideLine: Mike is reviewing this celebration carefully.

scoreboard.title: Birthday Scoreboard
scoreboard.note: Every official spin adds another birthday moment.

rules: Every official spin is a win.
Any promised cash or gifts are supplied by Norma, not Playable Greetings.
The final result can be shared with Norma.

finale.title: 🎉 Official Birthday Result
finale.note: Faye completed every spin and unlocked a top cash win of $25. Norma will provide all prizes in person. More importantly, this whole celebration was made to give you a happy birthday moment.

footer: Made especially for Faye by Norma

claim.template: Faye won {amount} from Norma. Norma will provide the prize in person. Playable Greetings does not supply cash or gifts.

slots.marqueeStart: Faye, your birthday celebration is ready

auditor.name: Mike
lines: Mike is reviewing this celebration carefully.
Mike is checking the Celebration Manual.
Mike has misplaced the objection forms.
Mike has stamped this celebration APPROVED.

officialSpins.title: Celebration Started
officialSpins.message: Faye, you opened a birthday greeting made especially for you. Your first win is the simple fact that Norma wanted this moment to feel different.
officialSpins.auditorLine: Mike is reviewing this celebration carefully.

officialSpins.title: Instant Smile
officialSpins.message: This win carries the cheerful energy of baby videos on YouTube. May it bring an unexpected grin at exactly the right moment.

officialSpins.title: Chosen For You
officialSpins.message: Your daughter Norma chose to celebrate you this way. Every word, spin, and surprise began with her thinking about you.
officialSpins.auditorLine: Mike is checking the Celebration Manual.

officialSpins.title: A Moment That Matters
officialSpins.message: Pause here for a moment, Faye. This little game exists because Norma cared enough to make your birthday feel personal and worth remembering.

officialSpins.title: 777 Bonus Unlocked
officialSpins.message: Three bonus spins have officially appeared. Mike has searched for a technical violation and found none. The birthday celebration continues.
officialSpins.auditorLine: Mike has misplaced the objection forms.

bonusNoCash.title: A Little Extra
bonusNoCash.message: An extra birthday moment has arrived simply because stopping now would have been far too ordinary.

bonusNoCash.title: More Good News
bonusNoCash.message: The celebration keeps growing. This win is permission to enjoy being celebrated without needing any further explanation.

bonusNoCash.title: The Lasting Win
bonusNoCash.message: The final win is knowing that Norma wanted to create a moment you might smile about, share, or remember later.

bonusCash.title: Five Dollar Surprise
bonusCash.message: You won $5 from Norma, perhaps toward something connected with baby videos on YouTube or anything else that makes you smile.

bonusCash.title: Ten Dollar Win
bonusCash.message: The celebration just grew to $10 from Norma. The money is nice, but being intentionally celebrated is the real reason this spin exists.

bonusCash.title: Twenty Five Jackpot
bonusCash.message: Faye, you won the maximum $25 cash prize from Norma. Mike has stamped this celebration APPROVED, and your birthday victory is now official.
bonusCash.auditorLine: Mike has stamped this celebration APPROVED.
